basic_details.job_title: CSIR IIIM Security Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Indian Institute Of Integrative Medicine
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Indian Institute Of Integrative Medicine (CSIR IIIM) Security Assistant Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 01R/2026 on the official website of CSIR IIIM. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR IIIM Security Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age - 28 years Maximum Age: 31 years Age Relaxation: OBC (NCL): 3 years; Ex-servicemen: up to 3 years after deduction of military service rendered; Widows/Divorced Women: up to 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Ex-servicemen, JCO in Army or other Paramilitary Forces with five years experience in the work of security.
qualification.details: Ex-servicemen, JCO in Army or other Paramilitary Forces with five years experience in the work of security.

selection_process: Physical Test Personality Assessment Test Written Examination Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR IIIM to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR IIIM Security Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR IIIM Security Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR IIIM Security Assistant recruitment is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Security Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Security Assistant post at CSIR Indian Institute Of Integrative Medicine.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Security Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Ex-servicemen, JCO in Army or other Paramilitary Forces with at least five years of experience in security work.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Security Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Security Assistant position is 31 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Security Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected Security Assistant will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400 per month, as per Level 6.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official CSIR IIIM website or the direct application link provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What are the stages involved in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Physical Test, Personality Assessment Test, Written Examination, Document Verification, and finally, the Merit List.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by CSIR Indian Institute Of Integrative Medicine (CSIR IIIM).

faq.question: Q10. Where is CSIR IIIM located?
faq.answer: CSIR Indian Institute Of Integrative Medicine is located in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir.
